title: Evropsky projekt pro DLT financovani digitalizace SME pro prekonani krize

metadata.agency: Ministry of Industry and Trade of the Czech Republic
metadata.program: Projekt systemu financovani SME prostrednictvim EBSI

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The proposed project (EBSIMARKET) envisages the creation of a pan-European platform for bonds of small and medium-sized enterprises, which are one of the main tools for the recovery of the European economy affected by Covid-19 and the Russian invasion of Ukraine. Such a platform for issuing, purchasing and trading blockchain bonds could become one of the sources, or another channel to raise around 1 trillion for European SMEs. EBSIMARKET aims to improve the access of small and medium-sized enterprises to external financing at a time when macroeconomic conditions will have an adverse effect on the availability of funds and worsening access to bank loans.
